---
title: "Structural Bioinformatics: Exercise 2"
format: html
bibliography: bibliografia.bib
csl: vancouver.csl  
---

# Proteins background

{{< include docs/bg_info.qmd >}}

# Protein modeling

{{< include docs/Protein1_1Dfeatures.qmd >}}
{{< include docs/Protein1_complete.qmd >}}

{{< include docs/Protein2_complete.qmd >}}

# Results

# References
